title: Small cirrus and image-build fixes
body:
* Kill tha SHAs!
* Squash a gcloud typo
* Fix impossible 'wait -n'
* Fix evil-service banishment test
* Fix env. var collision on `$RET` in VM image intg. test
* Deal with runc not being where it is expected on Ubuntu
* Never try to release binaries when test-building VM images

***CIRRUS: TEST IMAGES***

comments.body: A rebase on top of #3630 (once it merges) should clear CI errors
***Groan and moan:***  Something's changed recently in Ubuntu LTS land.  Somehow tests are not finding runc available...
